description: An introduction to the physical processes that determine Earth’s weather and climate. Topics include atmospheric composition, flows of energy through the atmosphere, small-scale and large-scale winds, cloud and precipitation processes, climate change.
preAndCorequisites:
• Complete all of the following
    • Complete 1.5 units of:
      100 level PHYS
    • Complete 1.5 units of:
      100 level MATH
    • or permission of the department.
supplementalNotes: • Credit will be granted for only one of GEOG 220, EOS 220.
title: Weather and Climate
